summary: Synthetic repo is a 28-file TypeScript project (TaskFlow Pro) with 3-layer architecture, 2 architectural decisions, and 2 seeded bugs
context: PRD FR-TGT-001 requires a pre-built synthetic repository with 15+ files, 3 interconnected modules, 2 architectural decisions, working tests, and seeded bugs for benchmarking.
rationale: TaskFlow Pro uses: (1) Repository pattern for data access (BaseRepository→UserRepository/OrderRepository→Database), (2) Event-driven notifications (EventBus with typed events, NotificationService as listener). Seeded bugs: pagination off-by-one causing cross-page duplicates, and floating-point total calculation. 70 tests pass, fixture files live in fixtures/ and are excluded from main tsconfig.

alternatives.option: Generate repo programmatically instead of static fixtures
alternatives.reason_rejected: Phase 0 needs a hand-crafted repo with precise control over bugs and architectural decisions; generator is Phase 4 work
